title: Ashtray Round Glass Ashtray for Cigarettes 4.7" Dia Multicolour Crystal Glass Ashtray For Indoor/Outdoor/Living Room/Bar/Office/Restaurant

🌟Easy to Clean: Glass Ashtray Round Design Can Be Easily Cleaned Under Running Water With A Little Detergent.
🌟Wildly Use: The classic ashtray is suitable for home, living rooms, bedroom, kitchen, office, bar, cafe, hotel, restaurant, bathroom, buffet, and etc.
